meeting_name: Security of Supply of Mineral Resources Research Grant Moderating Panel Tuesday 11th & Wednesday 12th November 2014 Best Western Plus Park Grand Hotel, London Heathrow Panel Chair Professor Adrian Boyce University of Glasgow Dr David Alderton Royal Holloway, University of London Dr Karen Hanghøj Geological Survey of Finland and Greenland Professor Karen Hudson-Edwards Birkbeck, University of London Professor Andy Hursthouse University of the West of Scotland Dr Adam Jarvis Newcastle University NERC Staff and Observers Dr Chris Franklin Head of Earth Sciences NERC Dr Chloe Onoufriou, Programme Manager NERC Dr Lucy Hopewell, Panel Secretary NERC Mr Tony Hartwell, SoS Minerals Network Director KTN-Ltd.
